prompt: Draft a detailed protocol for a pseudo-virus plaque reduction neutralisation test (PRNT) to measure SARS-CoV-2 spike-specific neutralising antibody titres in convalescent sera or vaccine trials, using VSV-based pseudo-virus. The protocol should include: (1) pseudo-virus production: VSV-ΔG-luciferase complemented with SARS-CoV-2 spike D614G in HEK293T cells, harvest and titration, (2) cell preparation: Vero E6 or HEK293-ACE2 cells at 70% confluency in 96-well plates, (3) serum dilution series: 4-fold from 1:20 to 1:2560, (4) pseudo-virus incubation: 200 TCID50 per well, 1 h at 37°C before cell addition, (5) readout: luciferase (RLU) at 24 h post infection, NT50 calculation, (6) quality controls: virus-only, cell-only, and WHO standard serum controls. Include biosafety classification: VSV-ΔG pseudo-virus is BSL-2 material.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05) and SARS-CoV-2 neutralisation assay literature; target: SARS-CoV-2 spike; organism: SARS-CoV-2; catalogue version v1.0
